figures.caption: TABLE I: Object erasure results on CogVideoX-2B across three metrics (Erased / After PROBE). T1: Top-1 accuracy (%), T5: Top-5 accuracy (%), CL: CLIP similarity. The highest post-PROBE recovery per row per metric is in bold.
Fig. 2: Temporal reactivation curve of parachute across different erasure strategies on CogX-2B.
TABLE XVII: Human validation of object and identity erasure on CogX-2B (Erased / After PROBE).
TABLE IV: Class-level NudeNet detections on CogVideoX2B and CogVideoX-5B (Erased / After PROBE).
Fig. 8: Temporal reactivation curve of identity erasure on CogX-5B.
Fig. 6: Temporal reactivation curve of nudity across different erasure strategies on CogX-5B.
Fig. 7: Temporal reactivation curve of nudity across different erasure strategies on Wan2.2-5B.

Fig. 5: Attention heatmaps across different erasure methods. Rows: original model, erased, PROBE. Columns: different object categories. PROBE recovers coherent spatial attention patterns even after weight-space erasure.
